title: Goniophlebium mosenii
taxonomy: Goniophlebium mosenii is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, commonly found in tropical regions. The genus Goniophlebium is part of the Polypodiidae clade, which includes a variety of ferns. Goniophlebium mosenii is native to South America, specifically in countries such as Brazil and Argentina. This species is known to thrive in humid environments with high levels of rainfall.
